subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that, through His infinite bounty, thou hast attained, time and again, unto the outpourings of the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل نامتناهی الهی برشحات قلم اعلی مره بعد مره فائز شدی فضلش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
